● Done! 6 sticky notes are now arranged around me in a ring, each connected with a
  line:

   - 🍑 Yellow (top-left) — "Peachy keen!"
   - 🐰 Blue (top-center) — "Hop to it"
   - ☀️ Green (top-right) — "Rise and shine"
   - 🎨 Pink (bottom-right) — "Paint the town"
   - 🌊 Purple (bottom-center) — "Go with the flow"
   - 🪄 Orange (bottom-left) — "Pure magic"
